task: Add pytest and coverage tooling to pyproject.toml
description: Add pytest>=8 and pytest-cov>=6 to [dependency-groups] dev. Add [tool.pytest.ini_options] with testpaths, addopts (--cov=src --cov-fail-under=100), and [tool.coverage.run] with branch=true. Run uv sync.
acceptance_criteria: uv run pytest --collect-only exits 0. uv run pytest --cov=src runs without configuration errors.
steps: Add pytest>=8 and pytest-cov>=6 to [dependency-groups] dev
Add [tool.pytest.ini_options] section with testpaths=['tests'] and addopts
Add [tool.coverage.run] with branch=true and [tool.coverage.report] with show_missing=true
Run uv sync

description: Create tests/ and tests/debt_payoff/ directories with empty __init__.py files so pytest discovers the test modules.
acceptance_criteria: uv run pytest --collect-only finds tests/debt_payoff/ without errors.
steps: Create tests/__init__.py (empty)
Create tests/debt_payoff/__init__.py (empty)

description: Define CompoundingMode enum, Loan frozen dataclass (with per-loan compounding_mode field defaulting to MONTHLY, and optional intro_apr/intro_end_date), MonthlySnapshot frozen dataclass, and PayoffResult frozen dataclass with tuple[MonthlySnapshot, ...] snapshots field.
acceptance_criteria: mypy src/ passes strict. All four types importable. FrozenInstanceError raised on field assignment for MonthlySnapshot and PayoffResult. Loan.compounding_mode defaults to CompoundingMode.MONTHLY.
steps: Define CompoundingMode(Enum) with MONTHLY and DAILY values
Define Loan as @dataclass(frozen=True) with all fields including compounding_mode: CompoundingMode = CompoundingMode.MONTHLY
Define MonthlySnapshot as @dataclass(frozen=True) with month normalized to date(year, month, 1)
Define PayoffResult as @dataclass(frozen=True) with snapshots: tuple[MonthlySnapshot, ...]

description: 8 tests covering CompoundingMode values, Loan required and optional fields (including compounding_mode default), MonthlySnapshot and PayoffResult construction, and frozen enforcement on both frozen types.
acceptance_criteria: pytest tests/debt_payoff/test_models.py passes with 100% coverage on models.py.
steps: test_compounding_mode_values: MONTHLY and DAILY exist and are distinct
test_loan_required_fields: all required fields round-trip
test_loan_optional_defaults: intro_apr and intro_end_date default to None
test_loan_compounding_mode_default: compounding_mode defaults to MONTHLY
test_loan_with_grace_period: non-None intro fields stored correctly
test_monthly_snapshot_fields: all six fields verified
test_payoff_result_fields: all four fields including tuple snapshots
test_monthly_snapshot_frozen: FrozenInstanceError on assignment
test_payoff_result_frozen: FrozenInstanceError on assignment

task: Implement apply_compounding and simulate_payoff in calculator.py
description: Implement apply_compounding() with MONTHLY (APR/12) and DAILY ((1+APR/365)^days-1) modes, quantized to $0.01 ROUND_HALF_UP. Implement simulate_payoff() with input validation, sort by method, monthly loop with per-loan compounding mode, surplus cascade, grace period rate switching via (year, month) tuple comparison, and max_months guard.
acceptance_criteria: mypy src/ passes strict. ruff check and format pass. All ValueError paths raise on correct conditions. simulate_payoff returns one PayoffResult per loan in original input order.
steps: Define CENTS = Decimal('0.01') module constant
Implement apply_compounding() with MONTHLY and DAILY branches, quantize on return
Implement simulate_payoff() input validation (empty, zero-balance, duplicate names, budget, method)
Determine priority sort order (snowball: balance asc, name tiebreak; avalanche: apr desc, name tiebreak)
Implement monthly loop: accrue interest per loan using loan.compounding_mode, pay minimums, distribute surplus
Implement surplus cascade: zero loan, carry remainder to next-priority loan in same month
Implement grace period: compare (year, month) tuples; use intro_apr when within grace period
Implement month arithmetic: integer carry-over, no timedelta
Build and return list[PayoffResult] with tuple(snapshots)

description: Tests covering all 7 acceptance criteria from issue #2, all 6 ValueError branches, apply_compounding unit tests, and any remaining branches for 100% coverage.
acceptance_criteria: pytest --cov=src --cov-fail-under=100 passes with branch=true. All 7 issue ACs have a dedicated test. All ValueError paths tested.
steps: test_single_loan_monthly_payoff_matches_hand_calc (AC2): fixed inputs, hand-computed expected payoff date and total_interest using Decimal arithmetic
test_snowball_vs_avalanche_different_ordering (AC3): loans where lower-balance has lower APR; assert first-paid-off loan differs between methods
test_daily_compounding_exceeds_monthly_for_same_apr (AC4): balance=5000, APR=18%, budget=100, ~93 months; assert daily total_interest > monthly
test_surplus_cascade (AC5): small zero-APR loan + large loan, high budget; assert small loan zeroed month 1, large loan received cascade
test_grace_period_lower_total_interest (AC6): identical loans, one with 0% intro for 6 months; assert grace total_interest < no-grace
test_budget_equals_sum_of_minimums_terminates (AC7): each loan min > monthly interest; assert terminates without error
test_empty_loans_raises, test_zero_balance_loan_raises, test_duplicate_names_raises, test_budget_below_minimums_raises, test_unknown_method_raises, test_max_months_exceeded_raises
test_apply_compounding_monthly, test_apply_compounding_daily

description: Re-export CompoundingMode, Loan, MonthlySnapshot, PayoffResult, apply_compounding, simulate_payoff using explicit 'X as X' pattern for mypy no_implicit_reexport compatibility. Define __all__.
acceptance_criteria: from math_finance_tools.debt_payoff import Loan, simulate_payoff works. mypy passes. __all__ is complete.
steps: Add 'from math_finance_tools.debt_payoff.models import X as X' for all four types
Add 'from math_finance_tools.debt_payoff.calculator import X as X' for both functions
Define __all__ listing all six exported names

description: Verify all tooling passes before committing: ruff format, ruff check, mypy strict, pytest with 100% branch coverage.
acceptance_criteria: All four commands exit 0: ruff format --check src/ tests/; ruff check src/ tests/; mypy src/; pytest --cov=src --cov-fail-under=100
steps: uv run ruff format src/ tests/ && uv run ruff check src/ tests/
uv run mypy src/
uv run pytest --cov=src --cov-report=term-missing
